title: Vaessen Creative Greyboard 1mm-12 x 12-10 Chipboard Sheets-Bookbinding Supplies for Crafting and Scrapbooking, Grey, 30,5 x 30,5 cm
availability_text: Only 4 left in stock (more on the way).
features: GREYBOARD - Greyboard is perfect for bookbinding, crafting and scrapbooking; cut the sheets to the desired size and decorate them with paint, stamps, ink, stickers and much more

BOOKBINDING SUPPLIES – These book board sheets are ideal for bookbinding projects, such as covers for art journals, calendars, wall decorations, guest books and photo albums, and are compatible with our brand's binding machine
CARDBOARD FOR CRAFTING – The sturdy 1 mm thick craft chipboard is ideal for making scrapbooks, puzzles, picture frames, board games, gift boxes, dollhouses, models and much more
HIGH QUALITY - This greyboard is made from high-quality, 1 mm thick cardboard; it is acid-free and offers excellent strength and stability for your bookbinding supplies
CONTENTS - This pack contains 10 sheets of greyboard; the 12 x 12 inches sheets are suitable for creative projects that require a sturdy yet flexible base
description: Discover the versatility and reliability of Vaessen Creative's high-quality greyboard. Developed to meet the requirements of a wide variety of projects, it is the perfect solution for all your needs. Whether you are a professional bookbinder, an enthusiastic crafter, or simply looking for sturdy packaging material, these 1 mm thick sheets are the perfect solution. Ideal for bookbinding, scrapbooking, model making and many other craft projects, they provide a stable and reliable foundation for your creations. Thanks to rigidity and durability of the art board, your projects will retain their shape and structure, making it an indispensable addition to your craft and bookbinding supplies. The chipboard also fits perfectly in our Bind Easy binding machine for creating book covers and projects. This package contains 10 high-quality 12 x 12 inches greyboard sheets and offers a wide range of applications. The sheets are easy to cut and customise. For precise cutting, we recommend using a cutting mat, craft knife and safety ruler. The 1 mm thickness strikes the perfect balance between flexibility and strength. Made of high-quality, acid-free material, the greyboard is particularly durable, ensuring that your work will remain in perfect condition for years to come. Whether you are crafting intricate models or securing valuable items for shipping, these card board sheets will always deliver reliable results. Vaessen Creative offers greyboard in various sizes (12 x 12 inches, A3 and A4) and quantities (10 or 50 sheets).
